name: Modify Table Route
desc: Add, update, remove, or batch update routes/endpoints from an existing table

parameters.name: Route
parameters.display: Route unique identifier, route_name, or route_path to update/remove

parameters.name: UseAuth
parameters.helpText: If route should be protected and only authorized users can reach it

parameters.name: UseBody
parameters.helpText: If it should parse the payload into req.body (NextJS already does that, usebody adds CORS for it)

parameters.name: UseUploads
parameters.helpText: If entity has some kind of file, this activates the middleware that parses those

parameters.name: RoutePayload
parameters.display: JSON object for single add/update or JSON array for batch update
